description: CompositionGrey and beige striped polo T-shirt with purple accents, made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, half buttoned placket, appliqué work on both sides of the chest and a vented hemFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry cleanDo not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron directly on print/embroideryThis T-shirt from quiksilver is perfect for the cosmopolitan male who's fixated on the minimal mood of the moment. The polo tee is an off-duty essential in every man's wardrobe, wear it with denims or shorts and a jacket for a coffee date. You'll look great with casual shoes and an understated belt.Model statisticsThe product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
